raw: {"perspective": "Scaling Engineer", "findings": [{"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "packages/swarm/archive/code_index.py", "issue": "Builder script was moved to archive but still referenced by CI/CD. This caused silent failure: index built with 0 modules despite recent timestamp. Violates Law 5 (ONE PRIMARY ACTION) — dashboard showed no error, violating user's working memory load expectation.", "recommended_fix": "Restore code_index.py to active agents directory. Add CI step that fails if output file has zero entries. Add health check: compare module count against git ls-files for /skills/"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "code-index.json", "issue": "Empty index breaks dependency resolution at scale. At 10x users, skill routing will fail unpredictably. Latency spikes will cascade across ZEUS and BrandedBy.", "recommended_fix": "Implement pre-flight validation: abort build if no modules detected. Log count of discovered skills pre-build. Expose count via /api/health/skills."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: Builder script was moved to archive but still referenced by CI/CD. This caused silent failure: index built with 0 modules despite recent timestamp. Violates Law 5 (ONE PRIMARY ACTION) — dashboard showed no error, violating user's working memory load expectation.
findings.recommended_fix: Restore code_index.py to active agents directory. Add CI step that fails if output file has zero entries. Add health check: compare module count against git ls-files for /skills/

findings.issue: Empty index breaks dependency resolution at scale. At 10x users, skill routing will fail unpredictably. Latency spikes will cascade across ZEUS and BrandedBy.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement pre-flight validation: abort build if no modules detected. Log count of discovered skills pre-build. Expose count via /api/health/skills.
